disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: WHO says cruise ship-linked hantavirus outbreak over The World Health Organization (WHO) declares an end to the deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship which sparked international alarm, after the last person is confirmed to have tested
